title: The Trick Is Exposed
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on the trick is exposed, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Trick Is Exposed. Sanji battles Mr. 2 Bon Clay, whose mimicry turns the fight into a test of recognition and trust. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Run all you want, but you ain't gettin' away from me!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's pointless trying to run from me!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's time you stopped getting in my way, you stupid duck!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You can still stop the rebellion, right Vivi?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well done, Commander Carue. You're a real man...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You two can stand down now.

summary: This part develops the trick is exposed and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
